title: Zotero upstream compatibility review
goal: Review Zotero upstream changes that affect Zoplicate's duplicate detection, merge, patch, or UI integration contracts.
in_scope: Inspect changed upstream watch targets: collection-tree-render-item, collection-tree-row-duplicates-search-object, duplicates-merge-pane-merge, duplicates-merge-pane-set-items, duplicates-merge-pane-set-master, item-tree-duplicate-selection
Update Zoplicate compatibility code and tests only where upstream changes require it.
Refresh upstream contract snapshots after compatibility work.
out_of_scope: Broad refactors not required by upstream compatibility
Changing release metadata unless Zotero compatibility bounds actually change
acceptance: Review .workflow/upstream/zotero_upstream_report.md and classify every changed target.
Update only the Zoplicate code paths impacted by the changed upstream targets.
Run uv run python scripts/ci/check_zotero_upstream.py --check-only after fixes.
Run targeted tests: tests/duplicatePaneUI.test.ts tests/duplicateSearchRecognition.test.ts tests/duplicateStats.test.ts tests/merger.test.ts.
